rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §31.006, which governs advisory committee formation for the State Board of Education.
quote: Sec. 31.006. ADVISORY COMMITTEE. The State Board of Education or the agency may form an advisory committee to comply with the provisions of this chapter.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed change.
